Investing in Fifth Settlement is an excellent opportunity for investors, as it contains many luxurious villas, mansions and resorts. There are also many commercial and administrative establishments in the area that provide all the necessary services to the population, such as shops, huge malls, major hospitals and international schools.

The Fifth Settlement area is characterized as being upscale areas that are witnessing a rise in real estate prices over time. The annual investment return rate on residential units reaches 5%, while on administrative units it reaches 10% and sometimes can reach 15%. In addition, the area of Fifth Settlement is considered one of the largest green spaces in New Cairo, making it an ideal area to live and invest in.

Of the main streets in Fifth Settlement, 90 Street is considered one of the most important and famous streets. This street is distinguished by its central location and vibrant area. It also has many commercial and entertainment facilities along it such as shops, restaurants and cafes.

In addition to its vast green spaces, the Fifth Settlement area is characterized by the availability of many necessary services and facilities such as international schools, sports clubs and specialized medical centers. The compounds and real estate projects in this area provide diverse housing units that suit the needs and budgets of different buyers. Flexible payment systems and payment facilities are also available that allow customers to achieve their dreams of real estate investment in Fifth Settlement.

Azad New Cairo is a luxury residential compound developed by Tameer, located in a prime spot in the heart of Fifth Settlement, New Cairo—specifically behind the American University and directly on South 90th Street.

The compound offers a variety of residential units and includes a wide range of services and amenities such as swimming pools, sports courts, green spaces, a gym, spa, medical centers, pharmacies, and commercial areas.

It enjoys a strategic location close to the American University in Cairo (AUC), Al Rehab City, and Cairo Festival City.

Azad is known for its expansive green landscapes and artificial lakes, creating a calm and relaxing environment, along with modern architectural designs that provide a fully integrated living experience.

The project spans 55 acres, with a smart layout that ensures privacy for all units while maximizing green and open spaces. It includes around 1,700 residential units of different types, including apartments, penthouses, villas, and administrative offices.

At the heart of the compound lies a central park, while the southeast corner features a business area with a community center offering various activities for all family members, along with an administrative building that includes offices and retail shops.
